query:
SELECT 
  m.id as movie_id,
  m.title as movie_title,
  m.releaseDate,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) as scene_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT spa.id) as action_count
FROM movies m
LEFT JOIN scenes s ON m.id = s.movieId
LEFT JOIN scenePerformerActions spa ON s.id = spa.sceneId
GROUP BY m.id
ORDER BY m.id DESC
LIMIT 5;
